rejection_reason: compliance: email_require_personalization — follow-up email uses 'Hi there' with no personalization token. The recipient name or company name must appear in the email body. Generic greetings are not permitted even in follow-up sequences.
text:
Subject: Re: Saving time on onboarding

Hi there,

Following up on my previous email about streamlining your onboarding process.

I noticed your company is hiring aggressively, which means onboarding new team members efficiently is probably top of mind.

FlowAI helps teams save an average of 2 hours per day. Would a 15-minute call be worth it?

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
